2604.26774.title: MemOVCD: Training-Free Open-Vocabulary Change Detection via Cross-Temporal Memory Reasoning and Global-Local Adaptive Rectification
2604.26774.paper_summary: Open-vocabulary change detection aims to identify semantic changes in bi-temporal remote sensing images without predefined categories. Recent methods combine foundation models such as SAM, DINO and CLIP, but typically process each timestamp independently or interact only at the final comparison stage. Such paradigms suffer from insufficient temporal coupling during semantic reasoning, which limits their ability to distinguish genuine semantic changes from non-semantic appearance discrepancies. In addition, patch-dominant inference on high-resolution images often weakens global semantic continuity and produces fragmented change regions. To address these issues, we propose MemOVCD, a training-free open-vocabulary change detection framework based on cross-temporal memory reasoning and global-local adaptive rectification. Specifically, we reformulate bi-temporal change detection as a two-frame tracking problem and introduce weighted bidirectional propagation to aggregate semantic evidence from both temporal directions. To stabilize memory propagation across large temporal gaps, we construct histogram-aligned transition frames to smooth abrupt appearance changes. Moreover, a global-local adaptive rectification strategy adaptively fuses local and global-view predictions, improving spatial consistency while preserving fine-grained details. Experiments on five benchmarks demonstrate that MemOVCD achieves favorable performance on two change detection tasks, validating its effectiveness and generalization under diverse open-vocabulary settings.
2604.26774.paper_summary_zh: 開放詞彙變化檢測旨在識別雙時期遙感影像中的語義變化，而無需預定義類別。最近的方法結合了基礎模型，如SAM、DINO和CLIP，但通常獨立處理每個時間戳，或僅在最終比較階段進行交互。這種範式在語義推理過程中缺乏足夠的時間耦合，限制了它們區分真正語義變化與非語義外觀差異的能力。此外，在高解析度影像上以補丁為主的推斷往往削弱了全球語義連續性，並產生了零散的變化區域。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了MemOVCD，一種基於跨時間記憶推理和全局-局部自適應修正的無需訓練的開放詞彙變化檢測框架。具體而言，我們將雙時期變化檢測重新表述為一個雙幀跟踪問題，並引入加權雙向傳播以從兩個時間方向聚合語義證據。為了穩定跨大時間間隔的記憶傳播，我們構建了直方圖對齊的過渡幀，以平滑突變的外觀變化。此外，全球-局部自適應修正策略自適應地融合了局部和全局視圖預測，提高了空間一致性，同時保留了精細的細節。在五個基準上的實驗表明，MemOVCD在兩個變化檢測任務上達到了良好的性能，驗證了其在多樣的開放詞彙設置下的有效性和泛化能力。
2604.26774.author: Zuzheng Kuang et.al.
2604.26774.authors: Zuzheng Kuang, Honghao Chang, Boqiang Liang, Haoqian Wang, Lijun He, Fan Li, Haixia Bi
